items.title: Final Giannis Updates, Jaylen Brown Teams, Aaron Gordon, Walker Kessler & More | Third Apron Podcast
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt: We catch up on all the latest news and rumors today, and go over what will (hopefully) be our last discussion on Giannis trades before it finally happens. You can follow Yossi on: Twitter: https://twitter.com/YossiGozlan BlueSky: https://bsky.app/profile/yossigozlan.bsky.social…
